---
title: "div-anchors"
date: last-modified
date-format: "[Last modified:] YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss (z)"
format:
  html: default
---

# Welcome {.unnumbered}

**div-anchors** is a [Quarto](https://quarto.org/) extension that adds
visual URL anchor links to theorem and proof divs for HTML output,
similarly to the built-in `anchor-sections` option for section headings.

## Installation

```bash
quarto add d-morrison/div-anchors
```

## Usage

Add the extension to your document's front matter:

```yaml
filters:
  - d-morrison/div-anchors
```

Or add it to `_quarto.yml` to apply it to every document in a project:

```yaml
filters:
  - d-morrison/div-anchors
```

## Demo

See the [Div Anchors Extension Demo](example.qmd) for a live demonstration
of all supported theorem types.

## Source

Source code is available at
<https://github.com/d-morrison/div-anchors>.

## References {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs}
:::
